published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovCinelliNeweySharmaSyrgkanis2022: sharp Riesz omitted-variable-bias support bounds for linear causal functionals, including policy-effect functionals

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1 is nearby but targets a joint propensity/outcome-misspecification policy-value interval, not a CH-Riesz minimax-regret Tikhonov rule

published_prior_art.cite: KallusZhou2021 and HessFrauenMelnychukFeuerriegel2026 give minimax/optimal policy learning under unobserved confounding, but under propensity/MSM sensitivity rather than CH-Riesz partial-R2 geometry

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_offline_policy_joint_misspec_v1 has a compatibility warning for factual-law matching, but no CH-Riesz increment-pasting iff frontier or KZ/AC bridge

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovCinelliNeweySharmaSyrgkanis2022 gives Riesz support bounds; KallusZhou2021 and AdjahoChristensen2025 give separate policy-learning faces, not an iff latent-increment compatibility frontier

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The full-data Riesz increment is defined from mu_Q(X,A,U)=E[Y|X,A,U], a factual observed-action regression; the policy-value contrast needs an explicit potential-outcome regression mu_Q(a,X,U)=E[Y(a)|X,U] and a Riesz representer over both arms.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The collinearity condition divides by rho_y and rho_w, but the assumptions allow r_y=0 or r_w=0; restrict the iff frontier to positive budgets or define the zero-budget limiting case separately.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the factual mu_Q(X,A,U) notation with arm-indexed potential-outcome regressions and state exactly which tangent space defines a_{h,Q}.
Make the bridge map Lambda_CH(r_y,r_w) explicit and add a one-dimensional standardized-score lemma showing the Kallus-Zhou support convergence rather than assuming it by normalization.
Add a finite two-arm nondegenerate worked boundary environment showing the increment-pasting condition can actually be satisfied under bounded potential outcomes.

recommended_next_step: Revise the statement-level definitions before Stage 0: arm-index the latent outcome regression/Riesz object and isolate the positive-budget compatibility frontier.
